subject: Music Appreciation
structure: 60-minute paper. Theory: note values (semibreve/minim/crotchet/quaver), rest values, time signatures (2/4, 3/4, 4/4), treble & bass clef notes (FACE / EGBDF / ACEG / GBDFA), accidentals. History: RnB, Rock, Classical.
